results.title: ‘You left me on my birthday’: Fiancée’s Instagram post goes viral after Pune businessman murder arrest
results.description: Pune Rural Police have alleged that businessman Ketan Agarwal was murdered by his fiancée Siya Goyal and her alleged lover Chetan Chaudhary, who have both been arrested. An emotional Instagram story posted by Siya hours after Ketan’s death has now gone viral as investigators claim the fall from Lohagad Fort was part of a planned murder conspiracy.

results.title: Disagreement over nuclear inspections clouds U.S.-Iran teams work to finalize a war-ending deal
results.description: The U.S. and Iran were in dispute Tuesday over whether Tehran had agreed to allow UN inspectors to view bombed Iranian nuclear sites, as officials mediated talks on a permanent end to their war and violence broke out again in Lebanon.
